/CAL: SENTENCING BEFORE JUDGE CHARLENE KIESSELBACH IN DEPT 318/JAVS/X: SENTENCE ON COUNT 2 IS AS FOLLOWS:/AJW/CH2:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 6D/CTS: 6/4019HALF/CTORD: ADULT PROBATION IS TO ASSESS DEFENDANT'S NEEDS FOR ANGER MANAGEMENTAND-OR SUBSTANCE ABUSE COUNSELING OR PROGRAMS, DEFENDANT SHALL PARTICIPATE IN AND COMPLETE ANY SUCH PROGRAM OR SESSIONS AS DIRECTED BY APD/SAORD/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL NOT PHYSICALLY ABUSE, FINANCIALLY ABUSE, INTIMIDATE,MOLEST, ATTACK, STRIKE, STALK, THREATEN, ASSAULT, HIT, HARASS, DESTROY PERSONAL PROPERTY OF, OR DISTURB THE PEACE OF DONALD PAUL GARDUNO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL STAY AT LEAST 10 FEET AWAY FROM DONALD PAUL GARDUNOAND ANY VEHICLE BELONGING TO DONALD PAUL GARDUNO, EXCEPT WHEN INSIDE THE RESIDENCE OF 1112 PRAGUE STREET, SAN FRANCISCO WHERE DEFENDANT SHALL STAY AT LEAST 5 FEETAWAY FROM DONALD PAUL GARDUNO/WEAP/PROBREVFN/VF2:150/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT//OBEY/ACCEP/APPEAL/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL HAVE HER ANKLE MONITOR REMOVED IMMEDIATELY AT 70 OAK GROVE STREET, SAN FRANCISCO/

/CAL: JURY TRIAL BEFORE JUDGE KEISSELBACH IN DEPT 318/JAVS/X:CLOSING ARGUMENTS GIVEN,/ /X: JURY INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN,/X: JURY RETURNS VERDICT AS FOLLOWS:/X: GUILTY VERDICT ON COUNT 2/X: NOT GUILTY ON COUNT 1/X: SENTENCINGMEMO DUE BY NOON ON SEPT 13 WITH COURTESY COPY TO D318,/ /CONTD:SENTENCINGON SEPT, 17 2019 AT 9:15AM DEPT 318/DOP/

/CAL: JURY TRIAL BEFORE JUDGE KIESSELBACH IN DEPT 318, CCC,/JAVS/X: THE PEOPLE RESTS,/X: THE DEFENSE RESTS,/X: THE COURT GRANTS DEFENSE 1118,1 MOTION AS TO COUNT 3 AND DENIES IT AS TO COUNTS 1 AND 2,/TEXT:TRIAL PHASE DEFENSE CASE/CONTD: JURY INSTRUCTIONS, CLOSING ARGUMENTS AND JURY DELIBERATIONS IN DEPT318 AT 9:15AM ON SEPT, 10, 2019/DOP/

/CAL: JURY TRIAL BEFORE JUDGE KIESSELBACH IN DEPT 318,/JAVS/X: PEOPLE'S MOTION FOR ADMISSION OF DEMONSTRATIVE VIDEO FILED,/X: DEFENDANT MARLENE GARDUNO'S SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF TO PERMIT IMPEACHMENT OFCOMPLAINING WITNESS FILED,/TEXT:TRIAL PHASE VOIR DIRE- JURY SELECTION/CONTD: FOR FURTHER JURY SELECTION AND OPENING STATMENTS/PEOPLE'S CASE ON WEDNESDAY, SEP, 4, 2019 AT 9:15AM IN DEPT, 318,/DOP/

/CAL:JURY TRIAL/LDTR:09-05-19/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,//DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:DEFENSE AND THE PEOPLE ARE READY/CONTD:JURY TRIAL/SB:2HR/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL  MONITORING BYTHE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BYTHE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THENEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/GTWM/SA1:DONALD G (DOB 03-08-45)/SA2:1112 PRAGUE STREET/SAORD4:150 YARDS/SAORD/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/SB:2 HOUR/
/CAL:READING OF REMITTITUR ONTO RECORD/TEXT:JUDGMENT AFFIRMED; REMITTITURSPREAD UPON MINUTES/
